message:
[Recovery] stage=start retry=0 payload={'error_type': 'timeout_error', 'user_message': '⏱️ Request timed out

The model took too long to respond (e.g. network or overload).

**What you can do:**
• Try again in a moment
• Increase timeout via FORGE_LLM_STEP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 180s)
• Try a different model if the current one is slow

**Details:** LLM streaming call timed out after 180.0 seconds'}
